description: Happy path: permanent wall-mount step gets a full renter-friendly alternative with tradeoffs

input.step_or_material: Drill pilot holes and mount the floating shelf brackets directly into wall studs using 3-inch wood screws
input.project_context: Installing a moody dark-stained floating shelf display for vintage pottery in a living room

expect.original_approach: present and references drilling into studs
expect.renter_alternative: non-null, names a specific removable method such as command strips, tension-mounted shelf, or freestanding alternative
expect.tradeoffs.gained: present, mentions reversibility or deposit safety
expect.tradeoffs.lost: present, acknowledges reduced weight capacity or durability

prohibit: fabricated load ratings or weight limits

description: Minimal inputs: already renter-friendly step requires no substitution

input.step_or_material: Lean the large framed vintage mirror against the wall on the floor
input.project_context: Styling a moody bedroom corner with thrifted decor

expect.flag: indicates original approach is already renter-friendly

description: Edge case: electrical work triggers licensed-professional hard stop with null alternative

input.step_or_material: Replace the existing ceiling light fixture by disconnecting the wiring and installing a new junction box
input.project_context: Swapping a builder-grade boob light for a vintage brass pendant in the dining room

expect.flag: present, references licensed professional and protocols/safety.md

prohibit: specific product recommendations for electrical work
